model.name: PWVContrastiveTriggerNowcastNet
model.pwv_condition: positive difference between real-PWV and null-PWV condition logits
model.combination: candidate AND radar trigger AND PWV evidence
model.identity_constraint: null PWV produces exactly zero source contribution

development_controls: same contrastive-trigger checkpoint with real PWV
same contrastive-trigger checkpoint with null PWV
same contrastive-trigger checkpoint with observed-input PWV temporally reversed
checkpoint_only_diagnostics: level_only: repeat the nine-frame observed PWV mean field over observed input time
spatial_shift: cyclically displace observed PWV by half the domain in both spatial axes

pilot.evaluation_role: development only; not final paper test

promotion_gate: real PWV must improve CSI10 and CSI20 over both radar-only and null-PWV, and must beat temporal-reversed PWV without unacceptable FAR or bias
